title: imacodingboy is bad at coding
description: it adds an item called IMACODINGBOY is bad at coding and adds a block called IMACODINGBOY is bad at coding_block
body:
this mod is adding a item called "IMACODINGBOY is bad at coding" and a block called "IMACODINGBOY is bad at coding block" The Item IMACODINGBOY is bad at coding deals 47 attack damage and the block is a block
